brief_name: Sterling Capital Partners v. Vanguard Holdings (N.D. Ill.)
_note: Answer key rewritten to match the actual brief 7 content (Twombly/Iqbal/Tamayo cases) per the test_brief_7_answer_key.docx specification. The original brief7.json was prepared for a different draft with Greenfield/Mahoney/Donaldson cases that don't appear in the delivered .docx.

errors.description: Section II: 'Id. at 685' used after Tamayo intervened between Iqbal and the Id. — invalid antecedent per R. 4.1

Section II para 2: bare 'Id.' after string cite to Fowler + Mayfield + Hensley — invalid per R. 4.1
Section III: 'Twombly, supra, at 557' — supra forbidden for cases per R. 4.2(a)
Section III: 'Iqbal, supra, at 680' — supra forbidden for cases per R. 4.2(a)
Section IV: 'Tamayo, 526 F.3d at 1081' short form after 8+ intervening citations to other cases per R. 10.9(c)
Section V: 'The Investors Act' used as hereinafter form but never declared per R. 4.2(b)
Bell Atlantic Corp. (full-form Twombly intro): T6 'Atlantic' → 'Atl.'
Id. at 555-56: hyphen in pin range should be en dash per R. 3.2(a)
